headline: Ford’s MLB Deal And Home Energy Pilot Shape Long Term Story
summary: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) has become the new Official Automotive Partner of Major League Baseball under an exclusive multiyear agreement, replacing Chevrolet after roughly two decades in that role. The partnership extends across MLB, Minor League, and Little League programming, with co-branded campaigns planned around league events and fan engagement. Separately, Ford is participating in a Puget Sound Energy pilot that uses EVs, including the F 150 Lightning, as backup power sources for homes...

headline: Ford and Major League Baseball Unite to Celebrate America’s Pastime and the People Who Power It
summary: DETROIT & NEW YORK, March 23, 2026--Ford Motor Company and Major League Baseball today announced a multiyear exclusive partnership that brings together two American icons. As MLB’s Official Automotive Partner, Ford will show up for baseball at every level—from neighborhood Little League fields to the World Series—honoring tradition, celebrating human capability, and powering the moments that matter most.
